findings.name: analytics-worker-03
findings.waste_reason: n2-standard-4 GCE instance with 0.4% average CPU and 312 MiB memory usage (out of 16 GiB) over 90 days. No SSH sessions or serial port activity since April. The instance appears to be part of a decommissioned analytics pipeline.
findings.recommendation: Stop the instance and create a machine image for archival. If the workload has moved, delete the instance and its persistent disks.

findings.name: orphaned-data-disk
findings.waste_reason: 500 GiB pd-ssd persistent disk not attached to any instance for 55 days. Zero read/write operations recorded.
findings.recommendation: Create a snapshot for backup, then delete the disk. Consider moving to Coldline storage if the data needs long-term retention.

findings.name: staging-cloudsql
findings.waste_reason: db-custom-2-4096 Cloud SQL (PostgreSQL 14) instance averaging 1 active connection and 0.2% CPU over 90 days. No queries logged in Cloud Audit Logs since late April.
findings.recommendation: Export the database to Cloud Storage, then delete the Cloud SQL instance. Recreate from export if needed later.

findings.name: unused-static-ip
findings.waste_reason: Static external IP address not associated with any resource. GCP charges $0.010/hr for unattached static IPs.
findings.recommendation: Release the static IP. If it was reserved for a specific service, update DNS records and re-allocate when needed.

findings.name: load-test-runner
findings.waste_reason: e2-standard-2 instance in TERMINATED state for 38 days. The persistent disk (50 GiB pd-balanced) continues incurring charges.
findings.recommendation: Delete the instance and its disks. Create a machine image first if the load test configuration needs to be preserved.

executive_summary: Scanned 412 resources in GCP project my-gcp-project-123 (us-central1, us-east1). Found 5 idle resources with $387.20/month estimated waste. An underutilized GCE instance and an orphaned persistent disk account for 67% of total waste. Recommend immediate cleanup of the terminated load-test instance and staging Cloud SQL database.
